citations.quote: 1 attachment (3 MB) MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf;

findings.text: Source NAP-SRC-0029 is an Outlook email from accommodation@napier.ac.uk to Anfal Elbushra dated 12/03/2026, with a 3 MB PDF attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf'.
The extracted text of NAP-SRC-0029 confirms the attachment but does not contain the binary PDF data needed for extraction.
No binary extraction tool is available in the current harness to extract the embedded Student Licence PDF from the source file.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use a configured binary extraction tool (e.g., pdfdetach, 7z, or custom script) to extract the embedded PDF attachment 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' from the source file at path 01-sources/communications/NAP-SRC-0029 - Email - Elbushra, Anfal - Outlook.pdf. Save the extracted PDF as a candidate artifact and then extract its text content.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded Student Licence PDF from NAP-SRC-0029 using binary extraction tool

summary: Task requires binary extraction of an embedded Student Licence PDF from source NAP-SRC-0029. The source is an Outlook email with a 3 MB PDF attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf'. The extracted text confirms the attachment exists but does not contain the binary PDF data. No binary extraction tool is available in the current harness. A follow-up task is proposed to perform the binary extraction using a configured tool.

uncertainties.description: The harness does not provide a binary extraction tool; the task cannot be completed without one.
